audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer variables (psin, psout, pserr) are checked against NULLPS immediately after ps_alloc() with exit(EXIT_FAILURE) on null, so they are guaranteed non-null at their use sites (lines 54, 63, 72, 78, 79). The pe pointer is checked against NULLPE as the while loop condition at line 77, ensuring it is non-null inside the loop body (lines 78-79). No pointer dereference in idtest.c occurs without a prior null guard.
